zh.lifeSummary: Sarah Boswell於1647年出生在英國英格蘭倫敦。她於1669年7月29日與William Bradley在英國英格蘭倫敦聖 基路士 維特 可利普萊加特結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦聖 波托爾福也斯 邱奇 阿爾蓋特。

nameMeanings.name: Boswell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Beuzeville-la-Giffard in Seine-Maritime, France, named with the ancient Germanic personal name Boso + ville ‘settlement’. The final element has been altered as a result of association with the common placename ending -well ‘spring, stream’. Some instances of Bovill may have the same origin.

variants.name: Buswell
meanings: English (Midlands): variant of   Boswell  , of Norman origin.

variants.name: Bovill
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from any of several places in Normandy whose medieval forms share a similar range of variants, such as Bouville (Seine-Maritime), any of several places called Biéville (Calvados, Manche) or Biville (Manche, Seine-Maritime), Beuzeville-la-Giffard (Seine-Maritime), Boiville (Orne), and perhaps Boudeville (Seine-Maritime). See also   Boswell   and   Beville  .

variants.name: Biswell
meanings: English (Buckinghamshire): possibly from a lost or unidentified place called with Old English bēos ‘coarse grass’ + wella ‘spring, stream’. Alternatively, a variant of Boswell .

variants.name: Bussell
meanings: English: variant of   Boswell   (of Norman origin) or   Bissell   1.

nameMeanings.name: Sarah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac. According to the Book of Genesis, she was originally called Sarai (possibly meaning ‘contentious’ in Hebrew), but had her name changed by God to the more auspicious Sarah ‘princess’ in token of a greater blessing (Genesis 17:15, ‘And God said unto Abraham, As for Sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be’). This has been one of the most enduringly popular girls' names.

variants.name: Sara
meanings: Variant of   Sarah .  This is the form used in the Greek of the New Testament (Hebrews 11:11).

en.lifeSummary: Sarah Boswell was born in 1647, in London, England, United Kingdom. She married William Bradley on 29 July 1669, in St Giles without Cripplegate, London, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She was buried in Saint Botolph's Church Aldgate, London, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Sarah Boswellは1647年にイギリスイギリスロンドンで生まれた。1669年7月29日にイギリスイギリスロンドンスト ギレス ウィソウト クリップレガトでWilliam Bradleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女はイギリスイギリスロンドンサイント ボトルフ'ス チャーチ アルドガトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sarah Boswell(은)는 1647년 영국 잉글랜드 런던에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1669년 7월 29일 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 자일스 위토우트 크리플레가트에서 William Bradley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 런던 세인트 벗프'스 c후르치 알드가트에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Sarah Boswell родилась в 1647 г. в местности Лондон, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Bradley 29 июля 1669 г. в местности ст джилесь витоут крипплегэит, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она была похоронена в местности сеинт ботолф'с чурч алджэит, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.
